# Chapter 7: Nervous and immune systems as control systems  (~100 pp)
- 7.1 Neurons as devices (12) · 7.2 Action potentials and signal propagation (15) · 7.3 Synapses, networks (12) · 7.4 The nervous system as distributed control (15) · 7.5 The immune system: recognition, response, memory (18) · 7.6 Adaptive vs innate immunity engineering-first (12) · 7.7 Failure section: autoimmune disease, infection, immunodeficiency (16)

**Archetype**: control, interface. **Project**: model a leaky integrate-and-fire neuron; reproduce simple firing patterns. **Exercises**: 30.
